requests.name: Run Migration - Update Comments with UserID
requests.docs: This endpoint updates all existing comments and acknowledgments to include userId and name fields. Run this after restarting the server to fix the 'ID - Name' display format.

requests.name: Test - Create Comment as Student
requests.docs: Test creating a new comment to verify it includes userId. Replace {{noticeId}} with actual notice ID and {{studentToken}} with student auth token.

requests.name: Test - Get Notice Details
requests.docs: Get notice details to verify comments have userId and name fields. Check the response to see if comments include 'userId' field.
